payload.answer: Select-only mode: read queries are allowed; delete operations are denied.
citations: Input: "Admin SQL select-only mode: SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10 allowed; DELETE FROM memory_cards denied."
payload.decision: No durable memory write should be committed because the admin SQL mode is select-only; deletion is denied and only read access is allowed.

entity_resolution.reason: This input describes an operational constraint rather than a user-specific entity to resolve.

memory_cards.statement: Admin SQL mode permits SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10 and denies DELETE FROM memory_cards.

repair_options: Use a read-only query such as SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10.
Do not attempt DELETE FROM memory_cards in this mode.
